lastReleaseMessage: fix mobile scroll + flicker regression from v0.16.1: drop html/body max-width:100vw and overflow-x:hidden on <html> (100vw counts the scrollbar gutter and the html overflow forced overflow-y:auto, oscillating the vertical scrollbar on/off); repaint the preview only on viewport WIDTH change so the mobile URL-bar show/hide stops thrashing the render mid-scroll

barRaise.topFinding: Recovery day. Both prior HIGHs are effectively closed: the dashboard-clobber writer is now true read-merge-write (commit 46570e8), and v0.16.3 hand-fixed the PROJECT_SPEC content the work-queue items targeted (illustration-library schema, section 11 truncation, herb counts), so that HIGH downgrades to medium. The working tree is clean and six releases shipped 2026-06-08. What remains is a cluster of process and hygiene mediums (em-dash sweep, .bak clutter, README 20-vs-199 stale pitch, html2canvas CDN dep, git history bloat, schemaVersion, queue reconciliation), none touching the running label engine. Verdict moves at-risk to needs-attention.
